evals.name: error-handling-refactor
evals.prompt: Refactor the create_propiedad handler to return proper AppError variants instead of generic 500 errors. Map database constraint violations to AppError::Conflict and missing fields to AppError::Validation.

assertions.text: Uses AppError enum variants (not generic 500 or anyhow)
Maps database constraint violations to a conflict/duplicate error
Maps missing or invalid fields to a validation error
Does not introduce unwrap() or expect() in handler code
Follows the existing error handling patterns in the codebase

evals.name: new-service-method
evals.prompt: Add a method to the contratos service that checks for overlapping active contracts on a property before creating a new one. If overlap exists, return an error. Follow the project's domain workflow pattern.

assertions.text: Implements overlap detection by checking date ranges of active contracts on the same propiedad
Returns a domain error (not panic) when overlap is found
Uses SeaORM query builder (not raw SQL)
Method signature uses Result return type

evals.name: add-pagination
evals.prompt: Add cursor-based pagination to the list_pagos handler. Support limit and optional cursor (last seen ID). Return the items plus a next_cursor field.

assertions.text: Accepts limit and optional cursor parameters
Returns a next_cursor field in the response for the client to use
Uses SeaORM for the query with proper ordering
Handler extracts params via Actix-web extractors (Query or Path)
